title: Pass-the-Ticket: Excessive Explicit Credential Logons
description: Detects Event 4648 explicit credential delegation at high frequency from a single source — indicates pass-the-ticket, over-pass-the-hash, or Rubeus asktgt lateral movement across the domain.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4648) and not ('Target Server Name' = 'localhost')) | eval Subject = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Target = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), TargetServer = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetServerName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Attempts by Subject, Target, TargetServer, Entity | where Attempts > 5 | sort -Attempts
falsepositives: Service accounts delegating credentials to multiple servers
